data.title: 国际服LINE Emoji表情包上线
data.summary: [LINE Emoji Release Notice] Sensei, "Blue Archive" emojis have been released in the LINE Store! Chec
data.body:
[LINE Emoji Release Notice]

Sensei, "Blue Archive" emojis have been released in the LINE Store!
Check out the 40 adorable Blue Archive emojis now!❤

➡️ LINE Store: https://store.line.me/emojishop/product/661653dce6303938f8e4f249/ko

#BlueArchive
